prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Novitec N-Tronic 4.0 Stage 2 ECU remap** for the **F154BH 3.9L twin-turbo V8**, optimizing boost pressure to 1.6 bar (stock: 1.2 bar) with custom ignition timing maps for 750+ HP at 8,000 RPM, paired with a **Novitec high-flow carbon airbox** and **BMC F1 Sport Air Filters** to eliminate intake restrictions

Install **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos** with **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegates** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV**, replacing the stock IHI turbos, coupled with a **Novitec stainless steel downpipe** (catless) and **Akrapovič Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system** with dual 100mm outlets for reduced backpressure and a 30% increase in flow efficiency

Replace the stock **Ferrari-spec Bilstein adaptive dampers** with **Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** (custom-valved for the Portofino M’s **aluminum-intensive chassis**), featuring **3-way adjustable compression/rebound damping** and **20mm adjustable ride height**, paired with **Eibach ERS Pro-Kit springs** (15% stiffer than OEM) and **Ferrari 488 Pista-spec carbon-ceramic brake rotors (410mm front, 390mm rear)** with **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers** and **Pagid RSL29 brake pads** for fade-resistant stopping power
estetica: Install the **Novitec N-Largo widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 50mm wider front fenders, 60mm wider rear) with **custom Novitec 21-inch forged aluminum wheels** (front: 9.5J ET35, rear: 12J ET40) wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (275/30 R21 front, 315/30 R21 rear)** for aggressive stance and improved grip

Fit the **Rocket Bunny V3 aero kit** (carbon fiber) including a **dual-element front splitter with integrated canards**, **side skirts with vortex generators**, and a **fixed carbon rear wing (1,200mm span, 300mm chord)** with **adjustable Gurney flaps** for 200+ kg of downforce at 250 km/h, paired with **Novitec carbon fiber engine cover** and **custom titanium exhaust tips**

Replace all exterior lighting with **Lux H8 V4 LED headlights** (5,000-lumen output, adaptive matrix beam) and **Novitec carbon fiber taillight surrounds**, while adding **Novitec carbon fiber side mirrors** (with integrated turn signals) and a **full custom matte Rosso Corsa vinyl wrap** with **gloss black accents** on the grille, vents, and diffuser
